inputs.label: Hydroxide Concentration
inputs.businessContext: Concentration of hydroxide ions [OH-] in moles per liter. Typical values range from 1e-14 to 1e0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Concentration of hydroxide ions [OH-] in moles per liter. Typical values range from 1e-14 to 1e0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidroksit iyonları [OH-] konsantrasyonu (mol/L). Tipik değerler 1e-14 ile 1e0 arasındadır.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature in degrees Celsius. Used to calculate water autoionization constant pKw. Standard pOH assumes 25°C where Kw = 1e-14.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature in degrees Celsius. Used to calculate water autoionization constant pKw. Standard pOH assumes 25°C where Kw = 1e-14.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santigrat derece cinsinden sıcaklık. Suyun otoiyonizasyon sabiti pKw'yi hesaplamak için kullanılır. Standart pOH, Kw = 1e-14 olduğu 25°C'yi varsayar.

inputs.label: Sample Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the aqueous sample in liters. For reference and scaling calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the aqueous sample in liters. For reference and scaling calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sulu numunenin litre cinsinden hacmi. Referans ve ölçeklendirme hesaplamaları için.

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty
inputs.businessContext: Relative uncertainty of the hydroxide measurement, expressed as a percentage. For quality assurance documentation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Relative uncertainty of the hydroxide measurement, expressed as a percentage. For quality assurance documentation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hidroksit ölçümünün yüzde olarak ifade edilen bağıl belirsizliği. Kalite güvence dokümantasyonu için.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
